category_sources: Official homepage at https://ff-extractor.sourceforge.net/ says ffe extracts, converts, verifies, and displays flat file content.
source_facts.description says it parses flat file structures and prints them in different formats.
display_name_sources: Official homepage at https://ff-extractor.sourceforge.net/ uses the title `ffe` and subtitle flat file extractor.
docs_sources: Official homepage at https://ff-extractor.sourceforge.net/ documents purpose, features, news, and source downloads; it is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official homepage at https://ff-extractor.sourceforge.net/ links SourceForge source downloads, but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage at https://ff-extractor.sourceforge.net/ lists flat-file extraction, conversion, verification, and configurable output formats.
source_facts.description identifies flat-file parsing and output formatting.
